text: The subject neighborhood is bordered to the North by Shepard Rd, to the South by College Ave, to the East by Airport Rd, and to the West by Hershey Rd. The subject is located in a neighborhood on the eastside of Bloomington, IL. It is a single family attached ranch style zero lot line. It conforms to most other existing homes in the neighborhood in design, quality, and condition. The area is within a mile of schools, recreation, shopping, and centers of employment.
